platformRelease.description: Platform release identifier; also the git tag of this repository revision.

components.description: Every image the release pins, keyed by component name.

image.description: Full image reference including tag (registry mirror prefixes are substituted per region, tags stay identical).

digest.description: Manifest digest on the canonical registry at release time.

teableCompatibility.description: Compatibility window for the Teable app connecting to this runtime.

minRelease.description: Oldest Teable release tag supported by this platform release (date-ordered release.* tag).

verifiedRelease.description: The Teable release this platform release was verified against.

requiredMigrations.description: Migrations that must complete before or during the upgrade to this release; empty means hot-swappable.

guide.description: Path to the upgrade guide within this repository.

hotSwap.description: True when upgrading from the previous platform release needs image updates only (no required migrations).

verified.description: What was actually exercised before this release was cut.
